chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No. 768 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of Main Case 07.04.2023: None present for the Applicant M/s. Khawaja Muhammad Azeem and Muteeullah Gondal Advocates for the Respondent Nos. 4 to 6 along with Faisal and Muskan Mr. Talib Ali Memon, APG ASI Muhammad Azeem of P.S. Manghopir.-.-.-.- ASI Muhammad Azeem, Investigating Officer of the case is present and has explained that FIR No. 780/2022 was registered under Section 365-B/34 PPC at Manghopir Police Station against Respondents No.4 to 6, however, on the statement of girl Muskan that she has married with the Respondent No.6 (Muhammad Faisal) out of her own freewill, the police had recommended disposal of the FIR in “C” class which was accepted by the Judicial Magistrate-XIX, Karachi West on 26.10.2022. It however appears that an ossification test was carried out in which the girl was found below 18 years of age. Any party aggrieved is at liberty to pursue the necessary legal action in accordance with law. Application stands disposed in above terms. J U D G E Amjad PS
